name: typewriter
description: Typewriter effect component with customizable typing speed and cursor animation

registry_item.description: Typewriter effect component with customizable typing speed and cursor animation

visual_summary: A typewriter UI component that displays a blinking cursor and types out text after a set delay. It is used for displaying text in a visual manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: typewriter
Description: A typewriter UI component that displays a blinking cursor and types out text after a set delay. It is used for displaying text in a visual manner.
Style: animated
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: typewriter, text, animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
